title: Build a Python Web App with Flask

steps.title: Install Flask
hints: Create a file called requirements.txt in the workspace root.
The file should contain a single line: flask>=3.0

steps.title: Create the Flask Application
hints: Create app.py and import Flask from flask.
Instantiate the app with: app = Flask(__name__)
Add a route with @app.route('/') and a function that returns an HTML string.

steps.title: Add HTML Templates
hints: Create a templates/ folder in the workspace root.
Create templates/index.html with a form that POSTs to /analyze.
Update app.py to use render_template('index.html') instead of returning a string.

steps.title: Handle the Form and Compute Statistics
hints: Import statistics at the top of app.py.
Add @app.route('/analyze', methods=['POST']) with a function that reads request.form.get('numbers', '').
Parse the string by splitting on commas and converting each part to float.

steps.title: Display Results and Handle Errors
hints: Create templates/results.html with a <table> that shows each statistic.
Use {{ results.count }}, {{ results.mean }}, etc. to render Jinja2 variables.
Link back to the home page with ← Analyze another set.
